steps.title: Chaos Testing Framework
steps.text: The Kuestenlogik.Surgewave.Testing.Chaos package provides a chaos engineering framework for testing cluster resilience. Inject faults into storage, transport, and Raft consensus to verify graceful failure handling.

steps.title: 9 Fault Types
steps.text: The framework supports NetworkPartition, NodeCrash, DiskIoError, SlowNetwork, MessageCorruption, LeaderElectionDisruption, StorageFullError, ConnectionReset, and PartialWrite. Each fault can be scoped to specific brokers and peers.

steps.title: ChaosCluster
steps.text: ChaosCluster creates a multi-broker test environment where each broker has its own ChaosEngine. Use convenience methods like PartitionBroker, CrashBroker, and InjectLatency to write resilience integration tests.

steps.title: Scenarios and Scheduling
steps.text: Pre-built scenario helpers compose multiple faults into realistic failure patterns. FaultSchedule activates faults after a delay and auto-deactivates after a duration for simulating transient failures.
